response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches JSON reference for both 'Daisuke' and 'Carbonated Love'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized reference lyrics and visual text cues. On-screen lyrics for 'Carbonated Love' were used to preserve specific capitalization/emphasis (e.g., 'IGNORED', 'WANTING MORE'). 3. Timing & Pacing: Kept timings tightly wrapped to vocal activations to prevent delays during fast-paced segments. Included a visual title card for the second song during a dialogue-free transition at 03:30.
